faq.label: faq
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you'd want to know before reaching out — answered upfront.
faq.a_timeline: Most AI/ML projects run 4–10 weeks depending on scope. A focused RAG pipeline or CV model is typically 4–6 weeks. A full-stack AI product with custom training is 8–12 weeks. I'll give you a detailed timeline estimate after the discovery call, with milestones so you always know where things stand.
faq.a_pricing: I work project-based or on a monthly retainer. Project-based engagements typically start around $3,000 for scoped AI/ML work and scale with complexity. Retainers start at $2,000/month for ongoing engineering support. I don't do hourly — it creates the wrong incentives. You'll get a fixed-price proposal after we scope the work together.
faq.q_existing_codebase: Can you work within our existing codebase?
faq.a_existing_codebase: Yes — most of my projects involve integrating AI/ML capabilities into existing systems rather than greenfield builds. I'll ask for a codebase walkthrough in the discovery call and factor ramp-up time into the proposal. I've worked with Django, Rails, Spring Boot, and legacy FastAPI codebases alongside standard Next.js and React setups.
faq.a_timezone: I'm based in Ahmedabad, India (IST, UTC+5:30) and work async-first. Most of my clients are in the US, EU, and Middle East — I maintain a 4-hour overlap window with US Eastern and a larger overlap with EU. Weekly video check-ins are available, and I'm reachable async within a few hours during working days.
faq.a_nda: Always — before any code, architecture details, or proprietary information is shared. I use a standard mutual NDA which I'll send within 24 hours of our first call. If you have your own NDA template, I'm happy to review and sign that instead.
faq.q_stack: Do you work with a specific tech stack, or can you adapt?
faq.a_stack: My primary stack is Python (PyTorch, LangChain, LlamaIndex, FastAPI) for AI/ML and Next.js/TypeScript for frontend. I can adapt to your existing stack for integration work — I've delivered on AWS, GCP, and Azure, with Postgres, MySQL, and MongoDB backends. If your stack is unusual, mention it and I'll give you an honest assessment.

process.label: how it works
process.title: How I Work With You
process.subtitle: A clear, async-friendly process — from first call to handoff, you always know what's happening and what's next.
process.step_discovery_desc: 30-min call to understand your problem, constraints, and success criteria.
process.step_architecture_desc: I deliver a written architecture doc with diagrams before any code is written.
process.step_build_desc: Weekly async updates, shared staging environment, and early feedback loops.
process.step_review_desc: Code walkthrough, documentation, deployment guide, and knowledge transfer.
process.step_support_desc: A month of included support after handoff — bugs fixed, questions answered.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: 6+ years turning AI research into production software.
about.bio: I'm Akash — an AI/ML engineer and full-stack developer based in Ahmedabad, India. I specialize in taking bleeding-edge ML research and shipping it as reliable, scalable production systems. From RAG pipelines serving thousands of queries a day to real-time computer vision on embedded hardware, I've built across the full spectrum of AI applications. I work with startups, agencies, and mid-size teams worldwide — primarily remote, always async-friendly.
